query: SELECT pb.id, pb.variantId, pb.boxNumber, pb.length, pb.width, pb.height, pb.cbm, pb.packagingType, pb.piecesPerBox FROM package_boxes pb ORDER BY pb.id DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT pb.id, pb.variantId, pb.boxNumber, pb.length, pb.width, pb.height, pb.cbm, pb.packagingType, pb.piecesPerBox FROM package_boxes pb ORDER BY pb.id DESC LIMIT 5;
